org.bytedeco.cuda.cufile

Class CUfilePerGpuStats_t

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.bytedeco.javacpp.Pointer
      • org.bytedeco.cuda.cufile.CUfilePerGpuStats_t
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable

    @Properties(inherit=cufile.class)
public class CUfilePerGpuStats_t
extends Pointer
    \brief Per-GPU statistics structure used in Level 3
